mapper.insert: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureRoomExcptMapper.insertByPk */ insert into t_lecture_room_excpt (room_seq, start_dt, end_dt, memo) values (#{roomSeq},#{startDt},#{endDt},#{memo})
mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.LectureRoomExcptMapper.getExcptCnt */ select count(a.room_seq) from t_lecture_room_excpt a where room_seq in (0,#{roomSeq}) and #{srchEduDt} between a.start_dt and a.end_dt
